title: Form
description: Form component serves as a powerful tool for creating dynamic and responsive forms in Angular applications. With support for reactive forms, customizable message styles, events like onValidate, dynamic updates with updateOnChange, and functions for form submission and clearing, it empowers developers to create user-friendly and interactive forms that meet diverse application requirements.

sections.title: Look
sections.description: A simple example of using look property

sections.title: Label
sections.description: A simple example of using labelMode property

sections.title: Message Style
sections.description: A simple example of using messageStyle property

sections.title: Update On
sections.description: A simple example of using updateOn property

sections.title: Show Summary
sections.description: You can use ax-validation-summary to show summary of errors

sections.title: Validate
sections.description: You can access to rules and result of them with validate method

types.title: AXFormComponent
types.description: Main form component for creating and managing forms

props.name: labelMode
props.description: Specifies the mode of the label in the form field

props.name: look
props.description: Specifies the visual style of the form

props.name: messageStyle
props.description: Determines the style of the message in the form field

props.name: updateOn
props.description: Determines when the form should be updated

events.name: onValidate
events.description: Emitted when the form is validated

events.name: updateOnChange
events.description: Emitted when the form's update mode changes

methods.content:
/**
 * Validates the form fields.
 *
 * @param names - Optional array of field names to validate.
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Promise that resolves with validation results.
 */
validate(names?: string[]): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Resets all form fields without clearing errors.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Form fields are reset to their initial values.
 */
reset(): void

/**
 * Resets validation errors for all form fields.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. All validation errors are cleared.
 */
resetErrors(): void

types.title: AXFormFieldComponent
types.description: A container component for form fields that provides styling and structure

props.name: labelMode
props.description: Specifies the mode of the label in the form field

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, it disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the disabled state of the component changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Focuses the component.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void
